title: Escalation Bench
author: Neal Desai
release_scope: Official repository, public dataset, leaderboard, and task/trajectory browser; no paper is claimed or acquired.

official_repository.relationship_evidence: The repository README identifies Escalation Bench, links the canonical Hugging Face dataset and nealdes.ai leaderboard/browser, documents the 120-pair evaluation, and contains the harness, scorer/aggregation logic, analysis script, tool definitions, and published leaderboard.

official_web_snapshots.mutability_note: The nealdes.ai pages and JSON endpoints have no immutable revision identifier. These are acquisition-time snapshots whose hashes and acquisition timestamp are recorded; they must not be treated as commit-pinned artifacts.

trajectory_sample.selection_rule: For each L1-L4 in order, select the lexicographically first pair_id with exactly two records whose sides are proceed and handoff and where either record includes that line; preserve both complete browser task records and all displayed model/sample trajectories.

verification.archive_check: The GitHub archive passed unzip integrity testing; its eight blobs total 56,350 bytes, matching the complete, non-truncated recursive Git tree at the pinned commit.
verification.dataset_check: All 240 non-empty JSONL lines parsed. Task IDs are unique, there are exactly 120 pair IDs, and gold actions split into 120 request_handoff and 120 proceed records.
verification.cross_release_check: tools.json and tool_kinds.json are byte-identical between the pinned GitHub commit and pinned Hugging Face revision.
verification.browser_check: The 37,872,795-byte browser JSON parsed as 240 task records with eight model result blocks and 15,360 reported samples; the deterministic four-reason sample parsed as eight task records and 512 displayed trajectories. Spot inspection confirmed task text, worlds, terminal actions, arguments, outcomes, and trajectory steps are non-empty.
verification.credential_and_cost_boundary: Acquisition used only public GET endpoints. No credentials were collected and no paid model calls were made.
verification.review_boundary: Acquisition, inventory, extraction, and spot verification only. This manifest does not claim a deep review, validate pair purity or published metrics, establish handoff receipt or utility, or support safety, professional-validity, reliability, production-fitness, or readiness claims.

not_in_pinned_github_or_huggingface_rele: raw provider responses beyond what the mutable browser endpoint exposes
human receipt, adoption, usefulness, burden, or downstream consequence records for request_handoff
known_release_boundaries.browser_scope_note: The repository README says published trajectories are browsable rather than shipped. The public browser JSON currently exposes displayed task/model/sample trajectories, but it is mutable and does not provide an immutable rollout-release revision.
